notes: Reference EXRs rendered with the pinned pbrt v4 above. Tolerances reflect current measured parity (skinny's own default key light disabled; residual = RGB-vs-spectral + path-tracer-vs-sppm caustics) as a regression guard with headroom. Regenerate refs deliberately if the pbrt version or a scene changes.

scenes.name: bathroom
scenes.notes: Heavy scene from pbrt contemporary-bathroom. ref via: python tests/pbrt/regen_refs.py --scene bathroom --res 256 --spp 256 --integrator path (rendered with pbrt's PATH integrator to match skinny's path anchor; the authored sppm EXR is unclamped — max~2120, bypassing maxcomponentvalue — and pbrt's own path-vs-sppm differ by relMSE~0.63 on this caustic scene). FIREFLY CATASTROPHE FIXED (change film-maxcomponent-clamp): skinny now applies the pbrt film maxcomponentvalue=50 per-sample radiance clamp, so path|wavefront vs pbrt dropped 232.8 -> ~0.34 and bdpt-vs-path dropped 6612 -> 0.36 (MSE 0.017, structurally identical); skinny max 7985 -> 50; path megakernel==wavefront still 0.0000. STILL KNOWN-DIVERGENT for two residuals (each a separate follow-up that must LOWER these baselines): (1) pbrt-truth ~0.34 relMSE = RGB-vs-spectral / blackbody-emitter-normalization (skinny normalizes blackbody to unit-luminance, pbrt to peak-spectral-1); (2) self-consistency relMSE vs the path anchor stays large from dark-pixel /b^2 amplification on this noisy scene (BDPT MSE 0.017 but relMSE 0.36) plus a genuine sppm-vs-path estimator difference (sppm MSE 10.4, relMSE 65) — a metric-robustness follow-up. emissive-triangle-bsdf-mis (2026-06-24): path BSDF-hit MIS complement fixes area-light dim bias; bathroom mean 1.36->0.97, path FLIP 0.222->0.155 (megakernel==wavefront relMSE 0.0000). relMSE baseline 0.342 unchanged (exposure-aligned gate is brightness-blind; residual = RGB-vs-spectral). BDPT/SPPM/neural/restir baselines re-measure in their own changes (Path anchor moved brighter). SPPM BLACK-WALLS FIXED (change fix-sppm-bathroom-black-walls, 2026-07-04): sppmLoadMaterial rebuilt the deposit-time FlatMaterial without the Stage-2 rich inputs (transmissionColor/specularColor/diffuseRoughness, added to FlatHitMat by flat-lobes-rich-inputs AFTER PM-1 shipped) -> undefined values zeroed EVERY photon deposit (tau==0 scene-wide, indirect term dead, walls black). VisiblePoint now stores the three fields (scalar 152->180 B, MSL 192->240 B) and sppmLoadMaterial rebuilds them; test_sppm_state.py locks FlatHitMat-subset-of-VisiblePoint so a future FlatHitMat field cannot silently break the deposit again. measured sppm_vs_path relMSE 64.97 -> 2.59 (MSE 10.42 -> 0.297), linear-mean ratio sppm/path = 1.007 at 128 spp. measured sppm|wavefront pbrt-truth moved 0.364 -> 1.71: the OLD number was an artifact of the bug (black walls contribute 0/(ref^2) exactly where the noisy-dark /b^2 amplification lives; a lit-but-noisy wall scores worse than a black one) and the path anchor itself measures 0.83 vs its 0.342 record under the current code (anchor drift is a separate follow-up; sppm baseline left at the aspirational 0.364, scene stays known_divergent/xfail).

scenes.name: dragon
scenes.notes: Heavy subsurface dragon (28.8M tris → wavefront-only). ref via: python tests/pbrt/regen_refs.py --scene dragon --res 256 --spp 256. KNOWN-DIVERGENT (harness-first): subsurface brightness residual vs pbrt is a follow-up (see project_pbrt_subsurface_volumetric). Re-measure on a GPU host to pin the per-combo baseline.

scenes.name: disney_cloud
scenes.notes: nanovdb heterogeneous volume (WDAS cloud). CLEAN dual gate: mega≡wave EXACT (0.0), pbrt-truth relMSE 0.075 / mean 0.88× (residual = scatter-cap floor + RGB-vs-spectral on sun/env; constant sigma is now achromatic per constant-spectrum-achromatic-rgb, previously 0.077 / 0.87× when sigma was sRGB-tinted). Distant sun + constant sky env. Refs = pbrt v4 volpath maxdepth 100, 256 spp, 256x256.

scenes.name: bunny_cloud
scenes.notes: nanovdb heterogeneous volume (Stanford bunny, sky.exr HDR env). CLEAN dual gate: mega≡wave EXACT (0.0). pbrt-truth relMSE 0.117 / mean 0.737× — the dimness is the bounded multi-scatter cap (VOLUME_MAX_SCATTERS=64 Metal vs pbrt volpath maxdepth 50), recorded not hidden; constant sigma is now achromatic per constant-spectrum-achromatic-rgb (relMSE flat, mean 0.735→0.737×). Refs = pbrt v4 volpath maxdepth 50, 256 spp, 256x256; nikon_d850 sensor approximated by film exposure; env `Rotate 10` baked into the equiarea reprojection.

scenes.name: clouds
scenes.notes: pbrt procedural cloud medium (MEDIUM_CLOUD, change pbrt-cloud-procedural-medium): MakeNamedMedium "cloud" — analytic 5-octave Perlin fBm + wispiness warp + altitude falloff evaluated in-shader (cloud_noise.slang), no grid. Material "" null boundary. CLEAN dual gate: mega==wave EXACT (0.0), pbrt-truth relMSE 0.094 / FLIP 0.091 / mean 1.012x (constant-sigma spectrum tint via sampled_spectrum_to_rgb + RGB-vs-spectral + scatter-cap floor, recorded). sky.exr equal-area env reprojected at import. Refs = pbrt v4 volpath maxdepth 50, 256 spp, 256x256.
